coreMeaning.en: bark; outer layer of an organ

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: cortical = cortex + -al，皮质相关的

coreMeaning.en: prefix: cortex, adrenal cortex or cerebral cortex

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: cortisol = corti（皮质）+ sol（醇），压力激素皮质醇
